note: Terminology endpoints for the terminology server in LIVE mode. Mock mode NEVER calls them (it returns per-system placeholder codes). Using SNOMED CT-AU content on ANY endpoint requires an NCTS account + a SNOMED CT affiliate licence (input-gated, M11). These URLs are PUBLIC references, NOT secrets; OAuth credentials and any self-hosted endpoint are injected at DEPLOY from the secrets manager, never committed. The SNOMED CT-AU RF2 distribution itself is licensed material and MUST NOT enter the repo (gitignored).
primary_note: Intended LIVE target = the NCTS server (see environments.ncts_live_api). A self-hosted deployment (environments.self_hosted) overrides this at deploy via config/env. NOT the CSIRO sandbox — that is dev-only.

dev_sandbox.content: reference/international content; NOT the licensed SNOMED CT Australian Edition, AMT, PBS, or AU Core value sets
dev_sandbox.use: DEV/TEST ONLY — build and test the terminology adapter without credentials; NEVER production or clinical use

ncts_live_api.auth: SMART-on-FHIR OAuth2 (authorize/token at api.healthterminologies.gov.au/oauth2/*); credentials via secrets manager
ncts_live_api.content: SNOMED CT Australian Edition, AMT, PBS, AU Core value sets (LICENSED)
ncts_live_api.use: staging/production; requires NCTS account + issued OAuth credentials. '/integration/' is the NCTS integration (staging) environment; production is a separate endpoint/registration

self_hosted.url: <deploy-injected> — your own Ontoserver instance loaded with the NCTS SNOMED CT-AU RF2 distribution
self_hosted.content: SNOMED CT-AU RF2 (LICENSED; loaded at deploy, NEVER in the repo — see .gitignore)
self_hosted.use: production-grade; operator controls availability/SLA; licence-clean if hosted per NCTS/affiliate-licence terms

code_system_versions.AMT: Australian Medicines Terminology (AMT subset not yet validated)
